title: Add Multimodal Image Generator to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: CLI meets canvas
gist.blurb: Someone built a slick Multimodal Image Generator with a CLI and GitHub Pages demo, so we planted it in the greenhouse. Tweak parameters, change model sizes, and generate pixels from the comfort of your terminal.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Multimodal Image Generator to the apps showcase, highlighting a new open-source CLI and web interface for the image API.
gist.impact: Developers and tinkerers can explore a new reference implementation for building configurable image generation tools.
gist.visual_concept: A retro terminal (representing the CLI) sprouting a digital canvas. Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, adjusting dials on the terminal. The Monitor Robot excitedly holding a freshly generated pixel art printout.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, adjusting dials on a retro computer terminal that is rendering a beautiful landscape. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, excitedly holding a freshly printed picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, adjusting dials on a retro computer terminal that is rendering a beautiful landscape. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby, excitedly holding a freshly printed picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background.
